g.title: cluster_etiology
g.text: ① 원인 / 트리거 (Etiology — SHOCK trial: AMI 80%)

g.title: cluster_lv
g.text: ② 좌심실 부전 (LV Failure — SCAI 'C' onwards)

g.title: cluster_rv
g.text: ③ 우심실 부전 (RV — 비AMI, 폐색전, RV infarct ~25%)

g.title: cluster_sys
g.text: ④ 전신 혈역학 (Systemic Hemodynamics — SCAI Stage)

g.title: cluster_inflam
g.text: ⑥ 전신 염증 (SIRS in CS — Hochman 2003)

g.title: cluster_drugs
g.text: ⑩ 약물 PK / PD (Inotropes · Vasopressors · MCS)
